title: grammitis deplanchei
intro: Grammitis deplanchei, also known as the New Caledonian button fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Grammitis deplanchei include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, Grammitis deplanchei can be made into a tea or tincture for internal use, or applied topically as a poultice or salve to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
